title: calliandra inermis subsp. stylesii
intro: Calliandra inermis subsp. stylesii, also known as the pink powderpuff tree, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The plant's health benefits include wound healing, reducing fever, and treating various infections, making it a valuable herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Calliandra inermis subsp. stylesii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in folk medicine to treat various ailments.
